area_anchor: Prime queue idempotency and auth replay hardening
current_truth: Follow-up audit found queue-claim race risk, replay-window abuse risk, and dedupe requests consuming rate-limit budget.
next_scope_now: Implement atomic queue claim path, replay guard with signature-secret split, and dedupe-before-rate-limit sequencing with regression coverage.
adjacent_later: Add distributed queue ownership telemetry for claim-conflict rates
Promote transactional email copy to localized catalogs for functions runtime
evidence_refs: operator-stated: take forward via lp-do-ideas -> lp-do-build workflow
why: Concurrent queue processing and replayed signed requests can duplicate outbound actions, while dedupe submissions should not consume extension request quota.

intended_outcome.statement: Prime queue claims are concurrency-safe, signed requests are replay-protected, and duplicate extension submissions no longer erode rate-limit budget.
